artifact_scripts.description: Self-contained scripts for this run. Keys: query (HogQL), utils (API helpers), train (training script), predict (scoring script).

experiment_id.description: Groups runs from the same agent experiment session.

feature_importance.description: Feature importance scores from model training.

metrics.description: Model evaluation metrics (e.g. accuracy, AUC, F1).

model_url.description: S3 storage path to the serialized model artifact.

notes.description: Agent lab notebook: what was tried, what was observed, what to try next.
